title: Dharmapuri Records Highest Voter-Slip Distribution Rate in Kongu Belt
summary: The Dharmapuri district administration achieved 98.6% voter-information slip distribution, the highest in the Kongu belt, three days ahead of polling.

title: Edappadi K. Palaniswami Addresses Rally at Pennagaram
summary: AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami addressed a packed rally at Pennagaram, focusing on farm distress and the AIADMK’s record on rural welfare.

title: Dharmapuri Mango Growers Hail GI-Tag-Driven Export Surge
summary: Dharmapuri’s GI-tagged mango growers reported a 22% jump in advance orders from Gulf countries this season, attributing the surge to direct-export linkages.

title: Hogenakkal Eco-Tourism Corridor Phase-2 Sanctioned
summary: The state tourism department sanctioned ₹78 crore for the second phase of the Hogenakkal eco-tourism corridor, including waste management and visitor facilities.

title: Static Surveillance Teams Seize 740 Litres of Illicit Arrack in Harur
summary: Election enforcement teams raided multiple points in Harur and Palacode, seizing 740 litres of illicit arrack and detaining four persons under MCC violations.

title: Home-Voting Drive Reaches 3,800 Elderly Across Five Constituencies
summary: Polling teams completed home-voting for 3,800 senior citizens above 85 and persons with disabilities across all five Dharmapuri assembly constituencies.

title: TVK’s Vijay to Hold Final Roadshow at Dharmapuri Tomorrow
summary: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam chief Vijay will hold his final pre-poll roadshow at Dharmapuri tomorrow evening, with the district administration tightening security arrangements.

title: new  Haasan Promises Rural Development in Dharmapuri Rally
summary: Kamal Haasan addresses a major public rally in Dharmapuri promising comprehensive rural development, including new roads, irrigation, and skill centres for youth.

title: DMK Door-to-Door Campaign in Dharmapuri Town
summary: DMK candidate conducts intensive door-to-door campaign in Dharmapuri town today, focusing on welfare scheme beneficiaries.

title: AIADMK Promises Improved Drinking Water in Pennagaram
summary: AIADMK nominee promises improved drinking water facilities in Pennagaram as part of his constituency manifesto.

title: TVK Distributes Booth Slips in Rural Villages
summary: TVK workers distribute booth slips across rural Dharmapuri villages today as part of grassroots outreach.

title: BJP Highlights Road Infrastructure Development
summary: BJP candidate highlights road infrastructure development promises for Dharmapuri district under central schemes.

title: Flying Squads Seize Cash Near Harur
summary: Flying squads seize unaccounted cash during checks near Harur under model code enforcement.

title: DMK Vows Support for Drought-Hit Farmers
summary: DMK candidate vows better support for farmers affected by drought in Dharmapuri, including loan waivers and irrigation upgrades.

title: NTK Voter Awareness in Tribal Hamlets
summary: NTK activists organise voter awareness camps in tribal hamlets across Dharmapuri to ensure inclusive participation.

title: Congress Focuses on Pappireddipatti Irrigation
summary: Congress alliance candidate focuses on irrigation schemes in Pappireddipatti, promising to revive long-pending water projects.

title: Dharmapuri Collector Reviews Election Preparedness
summary: Dharmapuri Collector reviews election preparedness at the district control room with senior officials and observers.

title: SVEEP Street Plays in Bus Stand Area
summary: SVEEP teams conduct street plays on voting rights in the Dharmapuri bus stand area to reach commuters.

title: Paramilitary Deployed at Sensitive Polling Booths
summary: Paramilitary forces have been deployed at sensitive polling booths across Dharmapuri district for safe polling.

title: Observer Inspects EVM Storage Centre
summary: Election observer inspects the EVM storage centre in Dharmapuri to verify security and randomization processes.

title: Home Voting Arranged for Elderly Voters
summary: Home voting facility has been arranged for elderly voters across Dharmapuri district.

title: Vijay Interacts with Youth in Dharmapuri Town
summary: TVK star campaigner Vijay interacts with youth in Dharmapuri town, promising rural employment opportunities.

title: AIADMK Assures Better Healthcare in Rural Areas
summary: AIADMK candidate promises improved healthcare facilities and PHC upgrades in rural Dharmapuri.

title: Congress Cycle Rally for Voter Awareness
summary: Congress leaders organise a cycle rally for voter awareness across Dharmapuri urban areas.

title: Cash Seizure Near Dharmapuri Market Area
summary: Cash seizure reported during routine flying squad checks near Dharmapuri market area.

title: BJP Visits Farmers on Crop Insurance
summary: BJP candidate visits farmers in villages to discuss central crop insurance schemes.

title: SVEEP Reaches Remote Panchayats
summary: The SVEEP programme reaches remote panchayat villages with voter awareness messaging.

title: TVK Promises Startup Support for Rural Youth
summary: TVK candidate promises startup support and skill training for rural youth in Dharmapuri.

title: Final-Phase Campaign Gains Momentum Across District
summary: AIADMK and DMK alliance campaigns gain significant momentum across Dharmapuri with large-scale rallies planned in major towns. Administrative focus has shifted heavily toward election logistics.

title: Voter Awareness Campaigns Reach Tribal Hamlets
summary: Voter awareness drives are reaching remote tribal hamlets across Dharmapuri, with SVEEP teams using local-language street plays to boost turnout.

title: Law Enforcement Monitors Media Violations Closely
summary: Local law enforcement is closely monitoring media-related model code violations in Dharmapuri, with unauthorised broadcasting incidents resulting in arrests.

title: Cultural Performers See Increased Demand
summary: Cultural performers across Dharmapuri are seeing increased demand during campaigns, with public gatherings boosting local economic activity.

title: Candidate Numbers Remain High After Withdrawals
summary: Candidate numbers across Dharmapuri's five constituencies remain high even after the withdrawal phase. Election scrutiny processes have been completed.

title: Administrative Systems Fully Focused on Polling Day
summary: District administrative systems are fully focused on smooth election execution. Results are expected to be announced in early May after the May 4 counting.

title: EVM Commissioning Underway in Dharmapuri Constituencies
summary: Election officials in Dharmapuri have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.

title: DMK Intensifies Final-Phase Outreach in Dharmapuri
summary: DMK candidates and alliance workers have intensified door-to-door outreach across Dharmapuri, focusing on welfare scheme beneficiaries and first-time voters.

title: SVEEP Street Plays Boost Voter Awareness in Dharmapuri
summary: SVEEP teams in Dharmapuri performed street plays at bus stands and markets to encourage 100% voter turnout on April 23.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Vehicle Checks in Dharmapuri
summary: Flying squads in Dharmapuri have intensified vehicle checks at major entry points and highway intersections to curb illegal cash movement.

title: Dharmapuri Reports Smooth Progress on Postal Ballot Distribution
summary: District election officials confirmed that postal ballot distribution to service voters and senior citizens in Dharmapuri is progressing as per schedule.

title: AIADMK Holds Booth-Level Worker Meetings in Dharmapuri
summary: AIADMK held booth-level worker meetings across Dharmapuri to finalize polling-day strategy and voter mobilization plans.

title: Dharmapuri Colleges Host Voter Pledge Programs
summary: Colleges across Dharmapuri hosted voter pledge programs for first-time voters, accompanied by mock EVM demonstrations.

title: Dharmapuri Static Surveillance Teams Report Daily to Observers
summary: Static surveillance teams in Dharmapuri are reporting daily to election observers on cash, liquor, and freebie movement.

title: Strong Rooms Sealed in Dharmapuri After Final Randomization
summary: EVM strong rooms across Dharmapuri have been sealed under multi-tier security following the final randomization of polling personnel.

title: BJP Highlights Central Schemes During Dharmapuri Roadshow
summary: BJP candidates conducted a roadshow in Dharmapuri highlighting central government welfare schemes and infrastructure investments.

title: Booth Slip Distribution Crosses Halfway Mark in Dharmapuri
summary: Door-to-door booth slip distribution in Dharmapuri has crossed the halfway mark, with BLOs targeting full coverage by April 18.

title: MCC Violation Notices Issued in Dharmapuri Constituencies
summary: Several model code of conduct violation notices have been issued in Dharmapuri constituencies for unauthorised hoardings and campaign material.

title: Dharmapuri Collector Reviews Polling Station Readiness
summary: The District Collector held a review meeting with returning officers in Dharmapuri to assess polling station readiness, water supply, and accessibility ramps.

summary: TVK cadre led by local coordinators stepped up the door-to-door campaign across Dharmapuri, distributing pamphlets and party manifestos.

summary: The Dharmapuri district administration has installed voter awareness hoardings at major junctions, urging citizens to exercise their franchise.

summary: Dharmapuri district police have beefed up security at sensitive booths with paramilitary deployment and additional patrol vehicles.

title: Mock Polls Demonstrated to Candidates in Dharmapuri
summary: Mock polls were demonstrated to candidate representatives in Dharmapuri as part of EVM transparency measures before the April 23 election.

summary: Congress alliance workers held street-corner meetings in Dharmapuri to highlight the alliance's promises on education and healthcare.

summary: The state voter helpline has seen a spike in calls from Dharmapuri, mostly enquiring about polling station details and voter slip status.

summary: A significant liquor seizure was reported during routine election-related checks in Dharmapuri, and the contraband has been impounded.

summary: Booth-level officers in Dharmapuri have concluded the final voter list verification, ensuring electoral roll accuracy ahead of polling.

summary: Differently-abled voters in Dharmapuri are receiving dedicated transport and assistance arrangements from the district election office.

summary: Income Tax teams have been conducting discreet surveys in Dharmapuri to track unaccounted financial flows linked to the election period.
